meaning: n.派别,小集团,派系斗争,小派系,内讧
examples: Mr. Takeshita became the party's kingmaker, handing the largest faction over to one of his own disciples.
But the royal faction did not give up without a fight.
Many of these anxieties are expressed by the “realist faction”.
